title: The Indian Statistical Institute Act, 1959
full_text: The Indian Statistical Institute Act, 1959 भारतीय सांख्‍यिकी संस्‍थान अधिनियम,1959 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195957 Act Number: 57 Enactment Date: 1959-12-24 Act Year: 1959 Short Title: The Indian Statistical Institute Act, 1959 Hindi Title: भारतीय सांख्‍यिकी संस्‍थान अधिनियम,1959 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the Indian Statistical Institute having at present its registered office in Calcutta to be an institution of national importance and to provide for certain matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation Enforcement Date: 01-04-1960 Notification: 1st April, 1960, vide notification No. S.O. 584(E), dated 2nd March, 1960, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Statistical Institute Act, 1959 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Declaration of the Indian Statistical Institute as an institution of national importance. Section 4. Grant of degrees and diplomas by Institute. Section 5. Grants, loans, etc., by Central Government to the Institute. Section 6. Audit of accounts of the Institute. Section 7. Prior approval of Central Government necessary for certain action by Institute. Section 8. Constitution of Committees by Central Government for preparing programme of work by the Institute, etc. Section 9. Review of work done, Inspection of assets, etc. Section 10. Institute to afford facilities to Committees. Section 11. Power to issue directions to Institute. Section 12. Power of Central Government to assume functions of control.
